seriesDescription: Short articles on ethical AI frameworks, governance, and practice—aligned with the Ethical AI Frameworks LinkedIn group.

articles.title: From NIST AI RMF to a Two-Pizza Team Backlog
articles.summary: Map Govern, Map, Measure, and Manage to concrete stories so a small team does not drown in abstraction.

articles.title: A Framework Is Not a Values Poster: What Teams Should Document
articles.summary: If it does not change a ticket, a test, or a sign-off, it is wallpaper. Here is the minimum structure that counts as a framework for shipping AI.
